learnerValue: Tests the specified causal link between rising average global temperature and climate change.
Secures the full definition, including all greenhouse gases and the complete life cycle.
Builds accurate recall of the gaseous and particulate emissions that may result from burning fuels.
Tests careful understanding of the qualified composition statement, including “and/or” and optional sulfur.
Distinguishes drinking-water safety from chemical purity.
Reinforces all assessed life-cycle stages and the inclusion of transport and distribution.
Tests recall of all four benefits of reducing use, reusing and recycling materials.
